title: Why Home Assistant Notifications Are Delayed or Not Arriving
summary: A practical troubleshooting guide for slow or missing Home Assistant phone alerts on iPhone and Android, with local push, permissions, priority, and safety caveats.
prompt: Create a clean photographic smart-home cover for an article about Home Assistant phone notifications that are delayed or not arriving. Use a warm residential kitchen or entry table in natural morning light. Show a modern smartphone lying on a wood or stone counter beside a small local smart-home hub and one compact sensor; the phone may show a simple generic notification glow or icon-like alert shape, but no readable text, no brand logo, no fake app interface, and no headline. Use photorealistic editorial product/lifestyle photography, realistic camera perspective, professional lighting, real objects, and a subtle dark-green local-control accent from a small status LED only. Avoid embedded title, words, numbers, logos, fake charts, graphs, network/path/routing lines, glowing connection trails, translucent UI panels, inset frames, floating cards, progress bars, people, hands, messy cables, sci-fi server rooms, and abstract diagram styling.
